title: Service State
description: Schema for the Service State manifest: observed running services, DNS registrations, backup job assignments, and service contract references. Populated by Tier 2 assessment and service metadata repositories.

cell_id.description: Stable unique identity of the Infrastructure Cell this service state belongs to

collected_at.description: Timestamp when this service state was collected

collection_errors.description: Errors encountered during service state collection

dns_registrations.description: Observed DNS registration state for services in this cell

backup_assignments.description: PBS backup job assignments for VMs and services in this cell

name.description: Service identifier, matching service contract name if declared

port.description: Primary port the service listens on

status.description: Observed service status at collection time

last_health_check.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful health check

contract_declared.description: Whether a Service Contract is declared for this service in Bootstrap State

secret_references.description: Secret Registry IDs required by this service

in_dns_registry.description: Whether this registration matches an entry in the Bootstrap State DNS Registry

drift_from_registry.description: True if the observed IP differs from the DNS Registry entry

backup_job_id.description: PBS backup job identifier, e.g. pbs-daily-vms

schedule.description: Backup schedule expression, e.g. daily at 02:00

pbs_host.description: Hostname or IP of the PBS server

last_run_status.description: Status of the most recent backup job run

backup_age_hours.description: Hours since the most recent successful backup

in_contract.description: Whether a backup_job is declared in the Service Contract for this VM
